name: airmail-mcp
description: Manage emails, calendars, contacts, and more from Claude using Airmail's MCP server.
long_description: Airmail MCP connects Claude to the Airmail email client for macOS. Read, search, compose, and organize emails. Manage calendars and reminders. Search contacts. All operations run locally through Airmail's built-in MCP server — your data never leaves your Mac.

tools.name: manage_capabilities
tools.description: Enable/disable tool groups to manage context.

tools.name: list_messages
tools.description: List messages in a folder (date desc).

tools.name: get_message
tools.description: Get full message: body (plain text), recipients, attachments, subject, date, labels.

tools.name: search_messages
tools.description: Search emails with hybrid FTS + semantic engine.

tools.name: search_contacts
tools.description: Search contacts/recent senders by name or email.

tools.name: get_draft
tools.description: Get draft content: body, recipients, attachments.

tools.name: get_message_thread
tools.description: Get all messages in a conversation thread (date asc).

tools.name: get_attachment
tools.description: Get the content of a specific attachment.

tools.name: export_eml
tools.description: Export message as .eml (RFC 822) file saved to disk (returns file_path).

tools.name: semantic_search
tools.description: Search by meaning via vector embeddings (macOS 14+).

tools.name: copy_messages
tools.description: Copy messages to a folder (originals stay).

tools.name: add_to_list
tools.description: Add messages to Todo, Memo, or Done list.

tools.name: empty_folder
tools.description: Empty trash or spam across all accounts.

tools.name: enable_disable_account
tools.description: Enable or disable an email account.

tools.name: share_icloud
tools.description: Upload a file to iCloud Drive and return a public share link.

tools.name: analyze_email_history
tools.description: Scan sent folder to build behavior profile (tone, contacts, topics).

tools.name: batch_triage_inbox
tools.description: Inbox messages with suggested actions (reply/archive/star/defer) and priority scores.

tools.name: get_user_profile
tools.description: Get user behavior profile: reply patterns, contacts, templates.

tools.name: update_user_profile
tools.description: Update profile: custom instructions, reply tone/length, add/remove templates.

tools.name: suggest_folder
tools.description: Suggest folder for a message based on learned move patterns.

tools.name: get_behavior_stats
tools.description: Behavior tracker stats: total actions, top sender→folder and domain rules.

tools.name: list_events
tools.description: List events in date range (default next 7 days).

tools.name: get_event
tools.description: Get event details: attendees, alarms, recurrence, notes.

tools.name: search_contacts_book
tools.description: Search contacts by name or email.

auth_token.title: Auth Token
auth_token.description: Bearer token from Airmail Preferences > MCP. If not set, the bridge will try to read it from the macOS Keychain (requires user approval).
